== Notes for [[Item:Q85187|Q85187]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 105 AH (723 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aban_bin_Uthman_bin_Affan

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
